title: EPC Industrie International Enterprises is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: EPC Industrie International Enterprises is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
EPC Industrie International Enterprises has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Hyderabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About EPC Industrie International Enterprises:
EPC Industrie International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EPC Industrie International Enterprises!
